items.title: One binary-search step — halving
items.mermaid:
flowchart TB S["sorted: [1, 3, 5, 7, 9, 11, 13, 15, 17]
target: 13"] S --> M1["mid = 9 → target > mid"] M1 --> R["right half: [11, 13, 15, 17]"] R --> M2["mid = 15 → target < mid"] M2 --> L["left half: [11, 13]"] L --> M3["mid = 13 → FOUND (index 6)"]
items.caption: Each step throws away half the remaining range — 3 comparisons for n = 9, log₂(n) in general.

items.title: Decision flow inside the loop
items.mermaid:
flowchart TB
  Init["lo, hi = 0, len(xs)"] --> Loop{"lo < hi?"}
  Loop -- yes --> Mid["mid = (lo + hi) // 2"]
  Mid --> Cmp{"xs[mid] vs target"}
  Cmp -- "=" --> Found["return mid"]
  Cmp -- "<" --> Right["lo = mid + 1"]
  Cmp -- ">" --> Left["hi = mid"]
  Right --> Loop
  Left --> Loop
  Loop -- no --> NotFound["return -1"]
items.caption: Standard half-open binary search. Note hi = mid (not mid − 1) when using [lo, hi).
